dialogos.texto_en: (A few days have gone by since we\n returned from the graduation trip.\n The day to head to Tokyo had finally arrived.)
(Before heading to the station, I stopped by\n the quintuplets' apartment to greet Itsuki,\n and for another reason%p-2;――%p;)
We made it in time, didn't we?
It was really close though.\nIn the end, we decided to exchange them\non the day I leave.
Did you remember to bring it with you?\nYou didn't accidentally send it to your new place,\ndid you?
Of course not. Here it is.
It was sent directly from Glass Village,\nso I haven't seen the finished product yet.
That makes it all the more exciting when you open it.\nI wonder how it turned out.
I thought I did a good job making it, but...\nif it turned out ugly, I apologize.
It doesn't matter.\nI'll still treasure it since you made it.
Well then, let me give you mine as well. Thank you.
Yeah, thanks.
I actually already opened it and took a peek,\nbut I rewrapped it carefully.
That's a relief.\nIt wouldn't be funny if it broke on the way to Tokyo.
Teehee, I'd be pretty mad if that happened, you know?
I-I'll be careful.
Use it with care, okay?
Of course. Well, I might keep it on display for a while.
Oh no.\nJust keeping it on display would be a waste.
I'm gonna use mine properly, so you should too.
That's right... Using it in everyday life\nwill make us feel closer to each other.
Yes, that's why we exchanged them\nin the first place.
I really want to see it now. Can I open it here?
What are you saying? No way.
It was a hassle to package it so it wouldn't break,\nyou know? If we rewrap it, we'll miss the train.
I see...
Heheh!\nDon't make such a childish, disappointed face.
I-I'm not making that kind of face.
You were. It may be the first time I've seen your face like that.
It's just a few hours. Please bear with it.
Oh, and I have a request.
What is it?
When you open the glass,\ncan you take a picture of where you have it placed\nin your new home and send it to me?
A picture?
I...want to see how my glass\nlooks in your new place in Tokyo%p-2;――
And, how it fits into your life.
Okay, I'll definitely send one.
I'll take a picture and send it to you\nwhen I open mine too.
Yeah, thanks.
Well, it's about time.
Ah... Yeah...
We'll be apart for a while,\nbut it's not like we'll never see each other again.
And when you see this glass, you'll remember me.
Yes, we'll still be together, even when we're apart.
That's right, always.\nWell then%p-2;――
I'm off. Take care, Itsuki.
Have a safe trip, Uesugi-kun.
